name: Beer Can Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and blot the chicken dry.
2. Combine the dry rub ingredients (seasoning salt, garlic powder, salt, and pepper) in a bowl.
3. Season the inside and outside of the chicken with the dry rub.
4. Inject Crispy Critters Basting Sauce into the breast, legs, and thighs.
5. Remove the top from the beer can and punch 6 or 7 holes using a church key.
6. Spoon the remaining dry rub mixture into the beer can.
7. Insert the beer can into the bottom cavity of the chicken.
8. Spread the legs of the chicken to form a tripod, allowing it to stand upright.
9. Smoke the bird for 3 hours or until well done and easily falls from the bone.
